conn_id.description: Airflow connection ID for the database to check.
conn_id.title: Conn Id

check_type.description: `row_count`: table has at least `min_rows`. `not_null`: `column` has no NULLs. `unique`: `column` has no duplicates. `custom_sql`: `custom_sql` returns a truthy single row.
check_type.title: Check Type

table.description: Fully-qualified table name. Required for row_count, not_null, and unique checks.
table.title: Table

column.description: Column to check. Required for not_null and unique checks.
column.title: Column

custom_sql.description: SQL returning a single row; the check passes if the value is truthy. Required for the custom_sql check.
custom_sql.title: Custom Sql

depends_on.description: Steps that must complete before this step runs

trigger_rule.description: Trigger rule for this step (default: all_success)
